name: nginx
description: High performance HTTP and reverse proxy server
nfpm_config: {"description":"High performance HTTP and reverse proxy server","contents":[{"src":"{{binary}}","dst":"/usr/sbin/nginx","mode":"0755"},{"src":"{{systemd_service}}","dst":"/usr/lib/systemd/system/nginx.service"},{"src":"{{default_config}}","dst":"/etc/nginx/nginx.conf","type":"config|noreplace"},{"dst":"/etc/nginx/conf.d","type":"dir"},{"dst":"/var/log/nginx","type":"dir"},{"dst":"/var/cache/nginx","type":"dir"},{"dst":"/var/cache/nginx/client_temp","type":"dir"},{"dst":"/var/cache/nginx/proxy_temp","type":"dir"},{"dst":"/var/cache/nginx/fastcgi_temp","type":"dir"},{"dst":"/usr/share/nginx/html","type":"dir"}],"depends":["openssl","pcre2","zlib"],"rpm_group":"System Environment/Daemons"}
script_postinstall:
#!/bin/bash # Create nginx group and user if not exists getent group nginx >/dev/null || groupadd --system nginx getent passwd nginx >/dev/null || useradd --system \ --gid nginx \ --no-create-home \ --home-dir /var/cache/nginx \ --shell /usr/sbin/nologin \ --comment "nginx web server" nginx # Ensure directory ownership mkdir -p /etc/nginx/conf.d mkdir -p /var/log/nginx mkdir -p /var/cache/nginx/{client_temp,proxy_temp,fastcgi_temp} mkdir -p /usr/share/nginx/html chown -R nginx:nginx /var/log/nginx /var/cache/nginx # Create default index.html if not exists if [ ! -f /usr/share/nginx/html/index.html ]; then cat > /usr/share/nginx/html/index.html <<'EOF' Welcome to nginx!

Welcome to nginx!

If you see this page, the nginx web server is successfully installed.

EOF fi # Reload systemd and enable service systemctl daemon-reload systemctl enable nginx.service 2>/dev/null || true # If this is an upgrade and the service was running, restart it if systemctl is-active --quiet nginx.service 2>/dev/null; then systemctl restart nginx.service fi
script_preremove:
#!/bin/bash
# Only run on uninstall (not upgrade)
if [ "$1" = "0" ] || [ "$1" = "remove" ]; then
    if systemctl is-active --quiet nginx.service 2>/dev/null; then
        systemctl stop nginx.service
    fi
    systemctl disable nginx.service 2>/dev/null || true
fi
systemd_service:
[Unit]
Description=The nginx HTTP and reverse proxy server
Documentation=https://nginx.org/en/docs/
After=network-online.target remote-fs.target nss-lookup.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=forking
PIDFile=/run/nginx.pid
ExecStartPre=/usr/sbin/nginx -t
ExecStart=/usr/sbin/nginx
ExecReload=/bin/kill -s HUP $MAINPID
ExecStop=/bin/kill -s QUIT $MAINPID
PrivateTmp=true

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
